message:
feat(search): implement RRF hybrid search fusion

- Implement RRF (Reciprocal Rank Fusion) for combining BM25 and semantic results
- Add HybridResult struct with rank tracking from both sources
- Support weighted fusion via RrfConfig
- Add fuse_simple and fuse_with_limit convenience functions
- Update search module exports with architecture documentation
- All 110 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
